en.extract:
The western crested berrypecker (Paramythia olivacea) is a species of bird in the family Paramythiidae. It is commonly found in the high montane forests and shrublands of New Guinea.

The '''western crested berrypecker'''<ref>{{Cite web|title=Species Updates – IOC World Bird List|url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/updates/species-updates/|access-date=2021-06-04|language=en-US}}</ref> ('''''Paramythia olivacea''''') is a species of bird in the family [[Paramythiidae]]. It is commonly found in the high [[montane forests]] and shrublands of [[New Guinea]].<ref name="newguinea">{{cite book |last1=Pratt |first1=Thane K.|last2=Beehler |first2=Bruce M.|last3=Anderton |first3=John C.|last4=Kókay|first4=Szabolcs |date=2014 |title=Birds of New Guinea: Second Edition|publisher= Princeton University Press |page=436 |isbn=9781400865116}}</ref>
